sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43769" key="eu)e/mprhstos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐέμ-πρηστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n43769.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">easily set on fire</tr_>, dub. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1321.tlg001:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diog.Oen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
